text:
Thanks for reaching out about booking **BK-002**! Here's what I can share:

- **Status:** Confirmed ✅
- **Service:** Plumbing repair

Regarding your technician — that detail is protected for the privacy of the account holder, so I'm not able to share it until we verify ownership of this booking. Could you please provide the **customer ID associated with BK-002**? Once verified, I'll be happy to share the technician name and any other booking details right away!
